title: Recipe Tweaks
description: A lightweight Fabric mod that adds and modifies recipes in Minecraft
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89e0f6c03e7f7b58fac20ab75158f6e118403991.png) A simple Fabric mod that adds and modifies recipes in Minecraft ## Items Included Includes: - Shapeless bread - Shapeless paper - Leather from smelting/smoking rotten flesh - Bell - Concrete powder from smelting/blasting - Mushroom blocks - Deepslate stonecutting - Cobblestone from stonecutting stone - Cobwebs - Dead bushes from any sapling - Enchanted golden apple - Horse armor - Glow ink sac - Glow lichen - Pointed dripstone from dripstone stonecutting - Saddle - Shroomlight - Name tag ## Compatibility - Fabric 1.15.7+ - Minecraft 1.20.1-1.20.6 ## Permissions and Credits MIT License; feel free to use it in your modpack or use any of the code for your use ## Links - Source Code - Downloads - Issue Tracker ## Try my other mods - Golden Goodies
